name: Compute Exchange
description: Compute marketplace starbridge-app: a factory-born job/escrow cell composing BUDGET (bid <= budget, the AffineLe budget gate) + ACCEPTED (write-once accepted bid) + FLASHWELL (conserving settlement, paid + refunded == budget) + LIFECYCLE (one-way POSTED -> BID -> SETTLED), re-enforced by the verified executor every turn. A requester posts a job with an escrowed budget; a provider bids a price that must fit the budget; settlement pays the provider and refunds the remainder atomically and value-neutrally.

deos.mount: register_deos (src/lib.rs) — folds the composed DeosApp into the StarbridgeAppContext affordance registry and SEEDS the job cell (installs the job program, POSTED state); DeosApp::mount yields the axum router
deos.publish: Signature (the job cell is a dregg:// sturdyref a provider/auditor on another federation reacquires)

affordances.view_job: cap-only, Signature (an OBSERVER reads the job state)
affordances.bid: GATED (cap∧state), Either — posted precondition (STATE == POSTED); the fire submits the FULL bid (provider + bid + state->BID), the executor re-enforcing BUDGET FieldLteField(BID <= BUDGET)
affordances.settle: GATED (cap∧state), None/root — bid precondition (STATE == BID); the fire reads live BID + BUDGET and pays the provider in full (paid := bid, refunded := budget - bid, state->SETTLED), the executor re-enforcing FLASHWELL AffineEq(PAID + REFUNDED == BUDGET)

deos.rights_ladder: Signature ⊂ Either ⊂ None IS the observer ⊂ provider ⊂ requester ladder
deos.seam: CLOSED — the fire runs against the seeded job cell carrying the full job program (BUDGET + ACCEPTED + FLASHWELL + LIFECYCLE), so an OVER-BUDGET bid (FieldLteField), a VALUE-CONJURING settle (AffineEq/AffineLe), and a NON-ADVANCING state (StrictMonotonic, strict) all BITE in the deos fire path (tests/deos_seam.rs — the three headline teeth). The factory-born cell carries the flat state_constraints predicate, so the budget and conservation teeth are executor refusals on the born cell too (tests/factory_birth.rs).
